title: Widget setup and integration documentation
description: Document the widget extension in CLAUDE.md (or an inline note): finalize and record the exact App Group identifier (group.net.renalias.AggregatorApp) and Keychain Access Group identifier; explain the requirement to run xcodegen generate after any project.yml change that touches the widget target; describe the widget rotation model (5 timeline entries ~3 min apart, ~30 min data reload, WidgetCenter-triggered reloads); and document the aggregator:// deep-link scheme format for future reference.
acceptance_criteria: App Group and Keychain Access Group identifiers are finalized and written down
CLAUDE.md or equivalent notes the xcodegen requirement after widget-related project.yml changes
Widget refresh model and rotation mechanism are explained
aggregator:// URL scheme and supported path formats are documented
